name: Wren
dialogue: You made it this far already? Not bad. Most turn back after the first room.
Watch your defense against anything that hits twice in a row. Learned that one the hard way.
I stopped delving after my third run. Traded the sword for a ledger. Better hours.
fallbackDialogue: Keep an eye out for chests. Some bite back.
Doors don't open themselves. Neither do locked ones, mind you.
Good luck out there. Try not to need it.
